_comment: Domain BAN HANG (ISP/viễn thông) — nang luc: TRA CUU THONG TIN + TRA CUU TRI THUC (search_knowledge theo topic enum, chấm được) + action + opt-out compliance.

tools.name: lookup_account
tools.description: look up the customer's current plan/usage by phone number

tools.name: search_knowledge
tools.description: retrieve sales knowledge by topic to answer a customer question

tools.name: recommend_offer
tools.description: register the product the customer wants to sign up for

tools.name: schedule_callback
tools.description: schedule a follow-up call with the customer
